ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #123-4567890-1234567 has been shipped
ham.body:
Hi Priya,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon! Your order #123-4567890-1234567 has been shipped and is on its way to you.

Item: 1x "Wireless Earbuds" (Blue)
Quantity: 1
Price: ₹2,500

Shipping Method: Amazon Logistics
Estimated Delivery: 3-5 business days

Tracking Number: 1Z999AA10123456789
Track your shipment here: <URL>

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reply to this email or contact our customer support at 1800-11-3522.

Happy Shopping!

Best Regards,
Amazon Customer Service

spam.subject: Urgent: FedEx Delivery Fee Due - Pay Now to Avoid Delay
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

Our records show that your FedEx package (Tracking # 1234567890) was scheduled for delivery on 15-Apr-2026, but the recipient was not available. As a result, a delivery fee of $45.00 has been added to your account.

To avoid further delays and ensure timely delivery, please complete the payment within 24 hours.

Payment Link: <URL>

If you do not pay, your package will be returned to the sender and you will incur additional charges.

Thank you,
FedEx Customer Support
